description_long: This is a modern tactical rifle with a digital camouflage pattern covering most of its body, designed for urban combat scenarios. It features a collapsible stock at the rear, a detachable box magazine, and a prominent pistol grip for ergonomic handling. The rifle is equipped with a rail system along the top for mounting optics or accessories, and a standard barrel with a flash hider at the muzzle. Underneath the barrel, there is a tactical foregrip and what appears to be an underbarrel attachment, possibly a grenade launcher or flashlight. The overall construction suggests a combination of metal and polymer materials, providing both durability and reduced weight.
description: A modern, camouflaged tactical rifle with a collapsible stock, rail system, and underbarrel attachment, designed for urban use. Features include a detachable magazine, pistol grip, and flash hider.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the collapsible stock, pistol grip, detachable magazine, rail system, and underbarrel attachment.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the barrel, flash hider, and the alignment of the underbarrel attachment beneath the main barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the rifle's profile, collapsible stock, magazine, and the underbarrel attachment from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the buttstock, pistol grip, and the alignment of the rifle's main components along its axis.
